ddls:
CREATE TABLE "articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the article */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the article */,
  "journal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the journal where the article was published */,
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* ID of the conference where the article was presented */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the article was published */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) for the article */,
  "topic" TEXT /* Topic of the article (e.g., innovation ecosystems, business strategy) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the article */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the article was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the article was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_conference_id FOREIGN KEY ("conference_id") REFERENCES conferences ("conference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_journal_id FOREIGN KEY ("journal_id") REFERENCES journals ("journal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "journals" (
  "journal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each journal */,
  "journal_name" TEXT /* Name of the journal */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Publisher of the journal */,
  "issn" TEXT /* International Standard Serial Number (ISSN) of the journal */,
  "publisher_email" TEXT /* Email address of the publisher */,
  "publisher_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the publisher */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the publisher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("journal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conferences" (
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conference */,
  "conference_name" TEXT /* Name of the conference */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the conference */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the conference */,
  "organizer_email" TEXT /* Email address of the conference organizer */,
  "organizer_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the conference organizer */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the conference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the author */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_authors" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author */,
  "author_order" INTEGER /* Order of the author in the article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id", "author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "citations" (
  "citation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each citation */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article that cites another article */,
  "cited_article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article that is cited */,
  "citation_type" TEXT /* Type of citation (e.g., direct, indirect) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("citation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_citations_cited_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("cited_article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_citations_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pageranks" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article */,
  "pagerank_score" REAL /* PageRank score of the article */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the PageRank score was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indegrees" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article */,
  "indegree_score" INTEGER /* In-degree score of the article */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the in-degree score was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "times_cited" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article */,
  "times_cited" INTEGER /* Number of times the article is cited */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the citation count was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the article */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the article was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location of the access (e.g., institution, country) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "topic_name" TEXT /* Name of the topic */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the topic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_topics" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the topic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id", "topic_id")
)
